label: Dirty War Disappeared
source: CONADEP (1984) / Madres de Plaza de Mayo
contestNote: CONADEP formally documented 8,961 confirmed cases; human rights organizations maintain the figure is ~30,000 total

label: IMF Loan (2018 Program)
deltaNote: Largest IMF loan in history at time of signing; renegotiated under Fernández (2022) and Milei (2025)

label: Argentine Malvinas Deaths
deltaNote: Includes 323 from sinking of ARA General Belgrano; UK lost 255 personnel

label: Consecutive Years of Democracy
deltaNote: Longest uninterrupted democratic period in Argentine history

label: Primary Fiscal Surplus (2024)
contestNote: Achieved through severe public spending cuts; critics dispute sustainability and social cost

label: GDP Contraction During 2002 Crisis
deltaNote: Cumulative 1999–2002 contraction was ~28%; peak unemployment hit 21.5% in 2002
